title: Mismatched 'if' and 'else' statements
description: The dangling else problem appears when nested if/else statements are written without curly braces. This rule reports else statements that are difficult to understand, because they are inside nested if statements without curly braces.
recommendation: Add curly braces to make the code clearer.

checks.message: Add curly braces to make nested if/else code clearer.
